description_long: This muffin features a rustic, golden-brown exterior with a slightly domed top, textured with visible cracks and a dusting of white flour or sugar. The crumb is dense and speckled, suggesting a hearty, whole-grain or bran-based recipe. The top surface is uneven, with some areas appearing more raised and others slightly sunken, giving it a homemade appearance. There is a light, irregular white topping, possibly a glaze or dusting, concentrated on the upper center. The sides and base are rough and baked to a darker brown, with no visible wrapper present. The muffin is shown isolated against a plain background, with no additional decorative elements or placement context.
description: A rustic, golden-brown muffin with a dense, speckled crumb and a light dusting of white topping on its uneven, domed top. The exterior is rough and baked, with no visible wrapper or decorations.
description_view_0: The cut face of the muffin reveals a dense, speckled interior crumb with a rough, uneven surface and a golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: A side profile showing the muffin's thick, rough crust and the height of the domed top, with some white topping visible.
description_view_2: The top and front of the muffin are visible, highlighting the uneven, cracked surface and the irregular white topping concentrated at the center.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the domed top and rough, baked exterior with a hint of the white topping.
